title: Order Cancellation Policy
content: Users can cancel an order within 2 hours of purchase from their dashboard. After 2 hours, orders enter processing and cannot be canceled manually.

title: Refund Eligibility
content: Refund requests are accepted within 30 days of product delivery. Items must be unopened, unused, and returned in the original packaging.

title: Shipping Timelines
content: Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days. Express shipping takes 1 to 2 business days.

title: Damaged or Broken Items
content: If an item arrives damaged, customers should contact support immediately with photos. A replacement or refund can be issued after verification.

title: Billing Disputes and Chargebacks
content: Billing disputes, chargebacks, and payment failures require human review. Customers should contact support with the last four digits of the payment method and the transaction date.

title: Account Security Guidance
content: If a customer suspects account takeover or unauthorized access, they should reset their password immediately, review recent sessions, and contact support for manual account review.

title: Subscription Management
content: Subscriptions can be paused or canceled from the billing portal. Changes apply to the next billing cycle unless the current cycle is still within the free-trial window.
